General.Name: LendingClub Corp
General.Description: LendingClub Corporation, operates as a bank holding company, that provides range of financial products and services in the United States. It offers deposit products, including savings accounts, checking accounts, and certificates of deposit; patient and education finance loans; and commercial loans, including small business loans. The company also provides consumer loans, such as Unsecured and unsecured, fixed-rate, and fixed-term consumer loans; and secured auto refinance loans. In addition, it operates a lending marketplace platform. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.
General.Address: 88 Kearny Street, San Francisco, CA, United States, 94108
